body_txt: An athlete in a race, an adventurer on top of a train , a pirate boarding a ship , a cunning politician executing an amazing plan , a Lovable Rogue during a Swordfight , a warrior during a Last Stand , two friends sparring—anyone facing an interesting and fun challenge with a reasonable chance of failure will sport one of these smiles. It's usually a bit forced, showing the strain and stress the user is under, and sometimes there could be a certain edge of malice and aggressiveness to it, even insanity : a hint of bloodlust , to be precise. Alongside genuine heroes, it's also very common amongst anti heroes of the Unscrupulous and Nominal types as well, especially if they are young and/or adrenaline junkies . It is usually coupled with a steady gaze, even a frown of sorts. The heroic counterpart to the Slasher Smile and the Psychotic Smirk , which both are mostly about enjoying the anticipation of hurting others, especially when it's secret and they're unaware of the threat. In contrast, the Grin of Audacity is about relishing the anticipation of winning . It may overlap with Dying Smirk .
